case_title: MICHAEL ANTHONY ENWEREUZO VS. IPSMARX TECHNOLOGY, INC.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-18-2014, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT IPSMARX TECHNOLOGY, INC.
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE AND DECLARATION IN SUPPORT FILED BY DEFENDANT IPSMARX TECHNOLOGY, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ENWEREUZO, MICHAEL ANTHONY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT IPSMARX TECHNOLOGY, INC. $8,826.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,916.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT IPSMARX TECHNOLOGY, INC. HEARING SET FOR APR-27-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
CORRESPONDENCE RE: NOTICE OF MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT AND DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT IPSMARX TECHNOLOGY, INC.
ORDER GRANTING REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM MOTION OF APR-27-2015 AT 3:30 PM.

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY IS GRANTED. "DEFENDANT'S VENUE CHALLENGE IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT THROUGH COURT CALL. DEFENDANT IPSMARX TECHNOLOGY, INC. WAS REPRESENTED BY ARASH VAHIDNIA--CEO. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-09-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-09-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-09-2015 - JUDGMENT.
ESHIBITS TO DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO VACATE (CANCEL) JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT IPSMARX TECHNOLOGY, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY ENWEREUZO, MICHAEL ANTHONY AS TO DEFENDANT IPSMARX TECHNOLOGY, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-09-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
